summary: Commission Decomposition Feature - Complete Testing. Backend: 18/18 tests passed. All commission calculations working correctly with Course + Addon decomposition. Frontend: Fixed Net Pay Trend chart display issue (API returns 'data' not 'data_points'). All features verified working.

integration_issues.issue: FIXED - Chart was not displaying because frontend checked for scatterData.data_points but API returns scatterData.data

passed_tests: Backend: Aleesha login successful (sales_executive)
Backend: GET /api/dashboard/sales-commission-info returns deal_earned, deal_pending, deal_details, benchmark_crossed
Backend: Aleesha has deal_earned=2665 for March 2026 (5 deals: 375+430+430+430+1000)
Backend: Course decomposition AED 2204 → Offer Course + Addons - Full Pack (commission 75+300=375)
Backend: Course decomposition AED 4104 → Intermediate + Addons - Full Pack (commission 130+300=430)
Backend: 18K benchmark correctly shows as cleared for Aleesha (revenue 49016)
Backend: GET /api/commissions/scatter-data returns 200
Backend: scatter-data returns 6 data points with commission and net_pay fields
Backend: scatter-data includes agent_name: Aleesha, role: sales_executive
Backend: CEO dashboard returns 200
Backend: CEO dashboard has 21 sales agents
Backend: CEO dashboard total_sales_earned: 17579
Backend: CEO drill-down shows Aleesha with achieved=49016, deals=5, earned_commission=2665
Frontend: Sales Dashboard loads at /sales/dashboard
Frontend: Deal-wise Commission table shows 5 deals with correct decomposition
Frontend: Commission values AED 375, AED 430, AED 1,000 displayed correctly
Frontend: Total commission AED 2,665 displayed correctly
Frontend: 18K Benchmark cleared indicator visible
Frontend: Net Pay Trend chart now displays correctly (after fix)
Frontend: Chart shows Base Salary, Commission, Net Pay lines over 6 months
critical_code_review_comments: Commission decomposition logic in _match_course_commission correctly handles Course + Addon combinations
18K benchmark logic correctly implemented - earned commission is 0 until benchmark crossed
Deal-wise Commission table shows all required fields: Student, Course Matched, Amount, Commission
Net Pay Trend chart displays 6 months of salary + commission data
updated_files: /app/frontend/src/pages/SalesDashboard.jsx - Fixed Net Pay Trend chart to use scatterData.data instead of scatterData.data_points
seed_data_creation: Used existing enrolled leads data for Aleesha in March 2026
context_for_next_testing_agent: Commission decomposition feature fully tested and working. Key endpoints: GET /api/dashboard/sales-commission-info (returns deal_earned, deal_pending, deal_details with decomposed commissions), GET /api/commissions/scatter-data (returns data array with commission and net_pay fields). Frontend route: /sales/dashboard. Fixed issue: Net Pay Trend chart was checking for data_points but API returns data - updated SalesDashboard.jsx to handle both.

commission_decomposition.description: Enrollment amounts are decomposed as Course + Addon to calculate correct commissions

response_format.data: array of {month, label, commission, net_pay, base_salary}

scatter_data_endpoint.note: API returns 'data' not 'data_points' - frontend fixed to handle both

benchmark_indicator.behavior: Shows 'Benchmark cleared — commissions unlocked' when revenue >= 18000
